field_values.scene_title: Transition Carter from the wilderness into the urban setting of Zodanga.
field_values.action_summary: Carter reaches the walled city of Zodanga. To avoid detection, he separates from Woola and enters the metropolis, observing its defensive architecture designed to prevent assassinations.
field_values.camera_intent: Low-angle shots of city walls; POV shots of the architecture; tracking shots of Carter moving through crowds.
movement_notes: Carter's level of disguise or inconspicuousness.
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH021_SC002

- chapter_id: `CH021`
- scene_title: `Transition Carter from the wilderness into the urban setting of Zodanga.`

## Production Intent

Transition Carter from the wilderness into the urban setting of Zodanga.

## Storyboard

Carter reaches the walled city of Zodanga. To avoid detection, he separates from Woola and enters the metropolis, observing its defensive architecture designed to prevent assassinations.
